name: One World Products, Inc.
summary: Overview On February 21, 2019, we entered into an Agreement and Plan of Merger (Merger Agreement) with OWP Merger Subsidiary, Inc. (OWP Merger Sub), our wholly-owned subsidiary, and OWP Ventures, Inc. (OWP Ventures). Under the Merger Agreement, the acquisition of OWP Ventures by us was effected by the merger of OWP Merger Sub with and into OWP Ventures, with OWP Ventures being the surviving entity as our wholly-owned subsidiary (the Merger).
